de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Interface IBreakpointStopCondition

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ApplyStrategy.IStopCondition
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BreakpointStopCondition, SymbolicExecutionBreakpointStopCondition

    public interface IBreakpointStopCondition
extends ApplyStrategy.IStopCondition
    Defines the basic functionality of an ApplyStrategy.IStopCondition which stops applying rules when at least one IBreakpoint is hit.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addBreakpoint(IBreakpoint breakpoint)
      Adds a new IBreakpoint.
      Set<IBreakpoint> getBreakpoints()
      Returns all available IBreakpoints.
      void removeBreakpoint(IBreakpoint breakpoint)
      Removes an IBreakpoint.

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.ApplyStrategy.IStopCondition

        getGoalNotAllowedMessage, getMaximalWork, getStopMessage, isGoalAllowed, shouldStop

    • Method Detail

      • addBreakpoint

        void addBreakpoint(IBreakpoint breakpoint)
        Adds a new IBreakpoint.
        Parameters:
        breakpoint - The IBreakpoint to add.

      • removeBreakpoint

        void removeBreakpoint(IBreakpoint breakpoint)
        Removes an IBreakpoint.
        Parameters:
        breakpoint - The IBreakpoint to remove.

      • getBreakpoints

        Set<IBreakpoint> getBreakpoints()
        Returns all available IBreakpoints.
        Returns:
        The available IBreakpoints.
